title: Luffy Strikes Back
description: Usopp formally challenges Luffy for the Going Merry, turning grief into a duel that the crew cannot stop.
scene: Across pages 11, 12, 13, 14, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Paulie, Nami, Iceburg. Usopp formally challenges Luffy for the Going Merry, turning grief into a duel that the crew cannot stop.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: I'll wait and see what happens next...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: and three times in the back...

dialogue.speaker: Franky Family
dialogue.text: The only thing they found there...

summary: Usopp formally challenges Luffy for the Going Merry, turning grief into a duel that the crew cannot stop.
